## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💡 New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 🏗 Infrastructure / DevOps
- [ ] 🤖 AI / Prompt change
- [ ] 🎨 UI / Design
- [ ] 📊 Analytics / Events

## Related Issues
Closes #___

## AI Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Prompt modified — describe change and expected behavior delta
- [ ] New edge function — endpoint documented in docs/API.md
- [ ] Token usage change — estimated cost impact: +/- $/month

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manually tested on iOS simulator
- [ ] Manually tested on Android emulator
- [ ] Tested on real device (model: ___)

## QA Checklist
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] TypeScript: zero errors (`pnpm turbo type-check`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm turbo lint`)
- [ ] Supabase migrations applied to staging
- [ ] PostHog events verified in staging dashboard
- [ ] Sentry: no new errors post-deploy
